full_text:
Experimental Plan

Experiment: Dissociation protocol optimization S484_iOme

Objective: Optimize the dissociation protocol to isolate more fibroblasts from ovarian tumors.

Approaches:

1. *Using trypsin and collagenase & hyaluronidase*:

1 hour C&H

2. *Using dispase followed by collagenase & hyaluronidase*:

30 min dispase + 1 hour C&H

Experimental Steps:

1. *Sample Preparation*:

Collected ovarian tumor samples

Minced the tumor piece into small pieces using a sterile scalpel and scissors, and divided the minced tissue into two equal parts.

2. *Dissociation Protocols*:

*Collagenase & hyaluronidase-only conditions*:

Treated sample with C&H for 1 hour at +37°C rotating. Vortexed before and after the incubation period.

C&H dissociation media: 8.9 ml DMEM/F12+++ media + 1 ml C&H (10x stock) + 100 µl DNAse (RNAse free)

Filtered the samples to obtain single-cell suspensions: 70 µm cell strainer

Pre-wetted the filter with 1 ml DMEM/F12+++, transfer the digested suspension through the strainer into a 50 ml Falcon tube, wash the stainer with 5 ml media, and discard the leftover tissue pieces.

Centrifuge the cell suspension 10 min 1000 rpm at +4°C

RBC lysis: 2 ml, incubated 5 min RT, added 10 ml cold DMEM/F12+++ media, centrifuged

Resuspended in 1 ml of DMEM/F12 media and made a 1:10 dilution for counting. Counted the cells and prepared the aliquots for flow cytometry.

*Dispase followed by collagenase conditions*:

Treated sample with dispase for 30 minutes (at +37°C rotating). Vortexed before and after the incubation period.

dispase dissociation media: 9.7 ml DMEM/F12+++ + 200 µl dispase 50 (U/ml stock) + 100 µl DNAse (RNAse free)

Filter the samples to obtain single-cell suspensions. Keep the tissue leftovers.

For cell suspension (dispase only):

RBC lysis: 2 ml, incubated 5 min RT, added 10 ml cold DMEM/F12+++ media, centrifuged

Resuspended in 1 ml of DMEM/F12 media. Counted the cells and prepared the aliquots for flow cytometry, long-term organoid establishment, and freezing.

Further, the leftover tissue was dissociated with C&H for 1 h at +37°C rotating. Vortexed before and after the incubation period.

C&H dissociation media 4.45 ml DMEM/F12+++ media + 500 µl C&H (10x stock) + 50 µl DNAse (RNAse free)

Filtered the samples to obtain single-cell suspensions

RBC lysis: 2 ml, incubated 5 min RT, added 10 ml cold DMEM/F12+++ media, centrifuged

Resuspended in 1 ml of DMEM/F12 media and made a 1:10 dilution for counting. Counted the cells and prepared the aliquots for flow cytometry.

Cell counts:

Dispase

cell count 1)

total: 3.84 E6 cells/ml

live: 0.908 E6 cells/ml

viability: 23.6 %

size: 7.3 µm

cell count 2)

total: 3.6 E6 cells/ml

live: 1.66 E6 cells/ml

viability: 46.0 %

size: 7.0 µm

on average 3.72 E6 cells/ml, 34.8 % viability

3.72 E6 cells in 1 ml

C&H

cell count 1)

total: 2.29 E6 cells/ml

live: 0.809 E6 cells/ml

viability: 35.3 %

size: 7.7 µm

cell count 2)

total: 2.39 E6 cells/ml

live: 0.579 E6 cells/ml

viability: 24.2 %

size: 7.6 µm

on average 2.34 E6 x 10 cells/ml = 23.4 E6 cells/ml, 29.75 % viability

23.4 E6 cells in 1 ml

dispase + C&H

cell count 1)

total: 1.68 E6 cells/ml

live: 0.419 E6 cells/ml

viability: 25.0 %

size: 7.9 µm

cell count 2)

total: 1.65 E6 cells/ml

live: 0.752 E6 cells/ml

viability: 45.5 %

size: 7.5 µm

on average 1.665 E6 x 10 cells/ml = 16.65 E6 cells/ml, 35.25 % viability

16.65 E6 cells in 1 ml

Made 1.5 E6 cell aliquots for flow cytometry:

from dispase + C&H, 2x multicolor, 8 x FMO,

from dispase only, 1x multicolor

from C&H only, 1x multicolor, 1 x unstained

Froze 2 cryovials with 1.1 E6 cells each from dispase dissociated cells

For Joonas/long-term organoid establishment, 0.5 E6 cells from dispase dissociated

3. *Flow Cytometry*:

Multicolor samples:

Only dispase

Only collagenase & hyaluronidase

Dispase + collagenase & hyaluronidase x2

Unstained sample: C&H

FMO samples (dispase + C&H)

DCM FMO

CD45 FMO

EpCAM (CD326) FMO

a-SMA FMO

CD29 FMO

CD31 FMO

PDGFR-β FMO

FAP FMO

Washed cells once with 900 µl FACS buffer (centrifuge 6min 400 g at +4°C).

For multicolor samples, diluted the antibodies in Brilliant stain buffer (#563794 BD Horizon), added 50 µl of the antibody mix to cells, and incubated 30 min at RT shielded from light.

For FMO samples, added the needed amount Brilliant Stain buffer (see table above) to the cells and then added antibodies one by one. Incubated 30 min at RT shielded from light.

After incubation, washed once with 900 µl FACS buffer.

Added 200 µl IC Fixation buffer (#00-8222 Invitrogen) to fix the cells and incubated for 40 min at +4°C shielded from light.

After incubation, 1 ml 1x Permeabilization buffer, and incubated 5 min at +4°C.

Centrifuged, washed the pellet with 1 ml 1x Permeabilization buffer, and resuspended in 900 µl FACS buffer for overnight storage.

Next day, centrifuged, diluted intracellular antibody in Permeabilization buffer, and resuspended pellet into 50 µl antibody mix. Incubate 30 min at RT shielded from light.

Washed once with 1 ml 1x Permeabilization buffer and resuspended in 400 µl FACS buffer.

Pipeted the cell suspension through 5 ml Falcon polystyrene tube with a cell-strainer cap (blue).

Preparation of compensation controls

Used BD CompBeads Plus (7.5 µm) compensation beads.

Added one drop of both positive (BD CompBeads AntiMouse IgG, #51-9006274) and negative (CompBeads Negative Control #51-9006227) compensation beads to 5ml Falcon polystyrene round bottom tubes (white cap).

For stained compensation controls, added 2 µl of each antibody.

the same antibodies as in FC panel except CD16-BV510 instead of BV510-DCM.

for aSMA, 2.5 µl instead of 2 µl

Incubated approx. 1 hour min at +4°C shielded from light and resuspended to 350 µl FACS buffer.
